source.purpose: Inputs to the sector take rate formula at May 31, 2026 close. Captured from the end-of-month report (scripts/eom-report-may.ts) and the 2026-05-31.json freeze. Used by the reconciliation gate to recompute the cited 3.38% reading.

notes: Formula reads 'trailing-30d Ethereum-only fees annualised by 365/30, divided by available liquidity at month-end'. The May reading of 3.38% is the first month-end on the captured series at which the sector's annualised revenue yield ran below the 4-week T-bill yield (3.60%).
